'''datuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tableau|tableau]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tableau|tableau]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| datuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dætiyith|dætiyith]] || [[word:dætiyij|dætiyij]] || [[word:dætiyish|dætiyish]] || [[word:dætiyi|dætiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:datutuyuth|datutuyuth]] || [[word:datutuyuj|datutuyuj]] || [[word:datutuyush|datutuyush]] || [[word:datutuyu|datutuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:datuyuth|datuyuth]] || [[word:datuyuj|datuyuj]] || [[word:datuyush|datuyush]] || [[word:datuyu|datuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:datufyuth|datufyuth]] || [[word:datufyuj|datufyuj]] || [[word:datufyush|datufyush]] || [[word:datufyuf|datufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:datuyuthu|datuyuthu]] || [[word:datuyuju|datuyuju]] || [[word:datuyushu|datuyushu]] || [[word:datuyuku|datuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:datuyuth|datuyuth]] || [[word:datuyuj|datuyuj]] || [[word:datuyush|datuyush]] || [[word:datuyu|datuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:datuyuthul|datuyuthul]] || [[word:datuyujul|datuyujul]] || [[word:datuyushul|datuyushul]] || [[word:datuyukul|datuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:datuyuthuthu|datuyuthuthu]] || [[word:datuyujuju|datuyujuju]] || [[word:datuyushushu|datuyushushu]] || [[word:datuyuku|datuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:datuyuthun|datuyuthun]] || [[word:datuyujun|datuyujun]] || [[word:datuyushun|datuyushun]] || [[word:datuyukun|datuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:datuyuthuoro|datuyuthuoro]] || [[word:datuyujuoro|datuyujuoro]] || [[word:datuyushuoro|datuyushuoro]] || [[word:datuyukuoro|datuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
